faq.title: Frequently
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about MonkeyPlan. If you can't find what you're looking for, don't hesitate to contact us.
faq.a1: MonkeyPlan is a complete management software designed for technical support centers, phone shops, used resale and multi-store networks. It manages repairs, warehouse, billing, fiscal POS, ticketing, CRM and much more in a single platform.
faq.a2: Yes, the first 100 licenses are completely free. You can use all the platform features at no cost.
faq.q3: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a3: No, MonkeyPlan is a web platform accessible from any browser. No software installation is needed, just an internet connection.
faq.q4: What roles does the platform support?
faq.a4: MonkeyPlan supports 4 main roles: Administrator (complete management), Reseller (sales and distribution), Repair Center (repair management) and Customer (tracking and requests). Each role has its own dedicated staff.
faq.a5: Absolutely yes. MonkeyPlan is designed for multi-store networks with support for multiple warehouses, merchandise transfers, B2B orders between locations and centralized management.
faq.q6: Is the POS compliant with Italian tax regulations?
faq.a6: Yes, our POS supports multi-rate VAT, electronic receipts, daily progressive numbering, lottery code and integration with Cloud Telematic Register via Fiskaly SIGN IT.
faq.q7: How do warranties and insurance work?
faq.a7: MonkeyPlan includes a complete system for managing warranties and insurance: multi-tenant warranty catalog, offering during repair intake, complete customer history and automatic billing.
faq.a8: Yes, we use PostgreSQL databases with continuous backups, encrypted connections and secure session-based authentication. Data is protected according to European regulations.
faq.q9: Can I integrate MonkeyPlan with my suppliers?
faq.a9: Yes, MonkeyPlan supports integrations with suppliers like SIFAR, Foneday and MobileSentrix for automatic catalog import, order management and shipment tracking.
faq.a10: We are developing a mobile app with push notification support via Expo. The web platform is already fully responsive and usable from smartphones and tablets.
faq.a11: Once registered, you can open support tickets directly from the dashboard. Our team responds within 24 business hours. For general information you can contact us by email.
faq.a12: Of course! User feedback is essential. You can send us suggestions through the ticketing system or by email.
faq.ctaSubtitle: Contact us directly, we'll be happy to help you.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy describes how MonkeyPlan collects, uses, stores and protects your personal data in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR).
privacy.s1Content: The Data Controller is MonkeyPlan, based in Italy. For any request regarding the processing of personal data, you can contact us at the email address: privacy@monkeyplan.it.
privacy.s2Content: We collect the following categories of data: (a) Registration data: name, surname, email, username, role; (b) Business data: company name, VAT number, tax code, address; (c) Usage data: access logs, platform actions, preferences; (d) Technical data: IP address, browser type, operating system; (e) Managed device data: IMEI, serial, model (entered by the user for repair management).
privacy.s3Content: Personal data is processed for the following purposes: (a) provision and management of the Service; (b) account authentication and security; (c) Service-related communications; (d) compliance with legal and tax obligations; (e) Platform improvement and aggregate analysis; (f) technical support and ticket management.
privacy.s4Content: Data processing is based on the following legal bases under the GDPR: (a) performance of a contract (art. 6.1.b); (b) compliance with legal obligations (art. 6.1.c); (c) legitimate interest of the Controller (art. 6.1.f); (d) consent of the data subject, where required (art. 6.1.a).
privacy.s5Content: Personal data is retained for the time necessary to pursue the purposes for which it was collected. Account data is retained for the entire duration of the contractual relationship and for the following 10 years to comply with tax and legal obligations. Access logs are retained for 6 months.
privacy.s6Content: Personal data is not sold to third parties. It may be shared with: (a) technical service providers (hosting, database) necessary for the Platform's operation; (b) competent authorities where required by law; (c) other Platform users to the extent necessary for the Service's operation (e.g., contact data between reseller and repair center).
privacy.s7Content: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data, including: encryption of communications (TLS), password hashing, role-based access control, periodic backups, access monitoring.
privacy.s8Content: Under the GDPR, the data subject has the right to: (a) access their personal data; (b) rectify inaccurate data; (c) delete their data ("right to be forgotten"); (d) restrict processing; (e) data portability; (f) object to processing; (g) withdraw consent. To exercise these rights, contact: privacy@monkeyplan.it.
privacy.s9Content: The Platform uses strictly necessary technical cookies for the Service's operation (e.g., authentication session management). We do not use profiling cookies or third-party cookies for advertising purposes.
privacy.s10Content: Data is stored on servers located in the European Union. In case of transfer to third countries, the guarantees provided by the GDPR will be adopted, including the Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission.
privacy.s11Content: The Service is not aimed at minors under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If we become aware that we have collected data from a minor, we will delete it.
privacy.s12Content: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy. Changes will be communicated through the Platform and/or by email. The date of the last update is indicated at the top of the document.
privacy.s13Content: The data subject has the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (Data Protection Authority) if they believe that the processing of their data violates the GDPR.

subResellers.infoDescription: Understand the difference between Sub-Resellers and Repair Centers
subResellers.infoSubResellerExplanation: A Sub-Reseller is an independent business partner who operates under your brand. They can manage their own customers, sell your products and services, and even have their own repair centers. Think of them as an extension of your business: they have their own account, their own pricing, and can generate their own invoices.
subResellers.infoRepairCenterExplanation: A Repair Center is a technical workshop that performs the actual device repairs. It receives repair orders from you or your sub-resellers, carries out diagnostics, quotes, and repairs. Repair centers focus exclusively on the technical side and do not manage customers or sell products.
subResellers.infoDiffCommercial: Sub-Resellers handle the commercial side (sales, customers, invoicing), while Repair Centers handle the technical side (repairs, diagnostics, parts).
subResellers.infoDiffHierarchy: Sub-Resellers can have their own Repair Centers underneath them, creating a multi-level network.
subResellers.infoDiffAccess: Sub-Resellers see products, prices and customers; Repair Centers see repair orders, parts inventory and diagnostics.
